# terrible_netapp_ontap_na_ontap_ntfs_sd (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the NTFS security descriptor name. Not modifiable.
- `vserver` (String) Specifies the vserver for the NTFS security descriptor.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `control_flags_raw` (Number) Specifies the security descriptor control flags. 1... .... .... .... = Self Relative .0.. .... .... .... = RM Control Valid ..0. .... .... .... = SACL Protected ...0 .... .... .... = DACL Protected .... 0... .... .... = SACL Inherited .... .0.. .... .... = DACL Inherited .... ..0. .... .... = SACL Inherit Required .... ...0 .... .... = DACL Inherit Required .... .... ..0. .... = SACL Defaulted .... .... ...0 .... = SACL Present .... .... .... 0... = DACL Defaulted .... .... .... .1.. = DACL Present .... .... .... ..0. = Group Defaulted .... .... .... ...0 = Owner Defaulted At present only the following flags are honored. Others are ignored. ..0. .... .... .... = SACL Protected ...0 .... .... .... = DACL Protected .... .... ..0. .... = SACL Defaulted .... .... .... 0... = DACL Defaulted .... .... .... ..0. = Group Defaulted .... .... .... ...0 = Owner Defaulted Convert the 16 bit binary flags and convert to decimal for the input.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `group` (String) Specifies the group's SID or domain account of the NTFS security descriptor. Need to provide the full path of the group.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `owner` (String) Specifies the owner's SID or domain account of the NTFS security descriptor. Need to provide the full path of the owner.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Whether the specified NTFS security descriptor should exist or not.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
